title: Pay-to-Public-Key (P2PK)
description: Legacy output type that locks coins directly to a full public key and spends them with a matching signature. It is simpler than P2PKH, but it reveals the recipient public key at receive time and mainly matters today as an early script template reference point.

resources.title: P2PK - Pay To Public Key
resources.notes: Decoding walkthrough using the Hal Finney transaction to show the locking script, unlocking script, and validation flow.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Concrete script-level reference for legacy output templates, signature verification, and spending conditions.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Transactions
resources.notes: Broad transaction and output-pattern reference that places P2PK in the historical script family.
